calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-17-300622 The Estate of Timothy Jone Low and
PTR-17-301172 The 1991 Lily Jean Low Living Trust.

Appearances: Brian Connors for Marsha Low (Temporary Trustee/Executor).

Mr. Connors stated that they have all of the relatives served in China, that he has prepared an order to give Ms. Low authority to move everything, that he spoke with the Probate Examiner and that he revised the order based on the conversation with Ms. Hilton. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Trustee (subject to review of the revised order). The Petition to Compel Conveyance of Interest in Real and Personal Property or to Quiet Title to Real and Personal Property, etc. in the Estate matter is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Sep-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-17-300622 The Estate of Timothy Jone Low and PTR-17-301172 The 1991 Lily Jean Low Living Trust.

Appearances: Brian Connors for Marsha Low (Trustee for Lily and Administrator for Timothy).

Mr. Connors stated that two of the siblings in Hong Kong and Macau were served and that the two siblings in Mainland China have not been served. Mr. Connors also stated that his Client has managed to have direct communication with the female Sibling who indicated that she would sign something stating that she received the documents, that the female Sibling also stated that she will ask the male Sibling to sign something and that they will have to mail the documents to them. The Court noted that once Ms. Low is appointed as Trustee and does her job, she will distribute to the estate and distribute pursuant to the will document. The Court also expressed that it does not see why the parties are doing an 850 Petition. The Petition to Compel Conveyance of Interest in Real Property, etc. is continued to September 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain something in writing from the two Siblings indicating they received the documents.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-27-2017 Continued To Jun-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan A. Chow, for and with petitioner Marsha Low.

Mr. Chan reported that there are four relatives living in Asia to whom notice is required to be given in compliance with the provisions of the Hague Convention. He said that this is a lengthy process, requiring up to six months to complete. He requested that Ms. Low be reinstated as temporary trustee so that she can complete the notification process, and that the hearing for petition for appointment of trustee be continued to June 18, 2018. The Court granted his request and reinstated Marsha Low as temporary trustee (order signed), and continued the hearing on the petition for appointment of trustee to June 18, 2018. The Order to Appear was taken off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-27-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Dec-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Trustee to appear on December 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a filed stamp copy of the petition and a proposed order have not been provided. The Temporary Trustee is suspended. The Petition for Appointment of Trustee is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee Because Of Need For An Immediate Appointment With Court Supervision
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
